Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Eduardo Robles, Esq., of DEHAY ELLISTON LLP (510-285-0750), appearing for defendant / moving party Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiff did not present any admissible evidence creating a triable issue whether he was exposed to joint compound or any other asbestos-containing product attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to plaintiff's declaration are sustained. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. While plaintiff's declaration contravened the D'Amico rule, there is no basis to find that the declaration was submitted in bad faith or for the purpose of delay. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
